title: hieracium leucophaeum subsp. bernense
intro: Hieracium leucophaeum subsp. bernense is a rare alpine plant species in the dandelion family that is native to the Swiss Alps. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The health benefits associated with Hieracium leucophaeum subsp. bernense include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's aerial parts are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and promote overall well-being.
